mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yy_field_mapping_metrics (platform_id, api_code, standard_field, total_attempts, success_count, null_count, transform_fail_count, validation_fail_count, last_value_sample, last_error_sample, first_seen_at, last_updated_at) VALUES (#{platformId}, #{apiCode}, #{standardField}, #{totalAttempts}, #{successCount}, #{nullCount}, #{transformFailCount}, #{validationFailCount}, #{lastValueSample}, #{lastErrorSample}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_attempts = total_attempts + VALUES(total_attempts), success_count = success_count + VALUES(success_count), null_count = null_count + VALUES(null_count), transform_fail_count = transform_fail_count + VALUES(transform_fail_count), validation_fail_count = validation_fail_count + VALUES(validation_fail_count), last_value_sample = COALESCE(VALUES(last_value_sample), last_value_sample), last_error_sample = COALESCE(VALUES(last_error_sample), last_error_sample), last_updated_at = NOW()
